crm.cards.onboard.description: Add new team members with documents, joining kit, and offer letter.

crm.cards.payroll.description: Process monthly payouts and manage salary slabs.

crm.cards.salary.description: Track earned salary, deductions, and real-time calculations.
crm.cards.attendance.title: Attendance
crm.cards.attendance.description: Daily punch-in/out, leaves, and monthly payable days.
crm.cards.reports.title: Reports
crm.cards.reports.description: Analytics, heatmaps, and staff performance at a glance.
crm.cards.leave.title: Leave Management
crm.cards.leave.description: Apply, approve, and track leaves with balance tracking.
auth.adminDescription: Sign in to the admin dashboard to manage attendance, payroll, leave, and team operations.
